section1.title: One Security
section1.subtitle: Every new skill is a step forward toward success.
section1.descriptionLineOne: Being compliant means protecting the people who work with you.

section2.title: Share your review with us
section2.description: Fill out the form to share your experience. Your review will be visible after approval.

chiSiamo.intro: We are a group of professionals dealing with property management, training, safety and health for companies and condominiums.
chiSiamo.objectiveLabel: Our goal is to make regulatory compliance easier and help our clients work and live in safer, more organized environments.
chiSiamo.formazioneDesc: we offer clear and practical courses, also online, thanks to an easy-to-use platform designed for workers, managers and training institutions.
chiSiamo.sicurezzaDesc: we support companies and condominiums with document compliance, mandatory courses, emergency plans and inspections to ensure increasingly safe workplaces in line with regulations.
chiSiamo.saluteDesc: we carry out laboratory analyses to prevent risks, provide support in occupational medicine and protect people's health.
chiSiamo.tagline: Training and safety, the engine for a calmer and more successful future.
chiSiamo.missionDesc: Our mission is to support micro, small, medium and large enterprises through targeted training paths, strategic consulting services and efficient management of document compliance. We believe in continuous growth, process simplification and skills development.

mission.card1Desc: Workplace safety is at the center of everything we do, with the goal of creating safer work environments.
mission.card2Desc: We use reliable and proven systems to offer quality, accessible and functional training paths.
mission.card3Desc: Every solution is designed around the specific needs of the client, ensuring concrete results.
mission.card4Desc: Quality standards in every course, with cutting-edge teaching methodologies.

pillars.card1Desc: We are constantly dedicated to continuous updates in compliance with current regulations.
pillars.card2Desc: An LMS platform designed to offer simple, effective and always up-to-date training paths in line with current regulations.
pillars.card3Desc: A single platform that includes diversified courses and personalized training paths, designed for every need.

workWithUs.heroDescription: The platform is available in cloud mode according to security, reliability and data protection standards. Find out how to collaborate with us for training, safety and professionals.

section1.title: For Training Entities
section1.description: We provide a dedicated space on our platform where you can:
section1.bullet1: offer your courses on health and safety at work
section1.bullet2: manage users and training paths independently
section1.bottomText: A practical and professional solution to enhance your services and ensure clients always have up-to-date and certified mandatory training.
section1.buttonText: Contact us and we'll take care of the rest!

section2.title: For Professionals
section2.description: If you work in the field of health and safety at work, join our network and offer your services in collaboration with us.
section2.subText: You will have the opportunity to:
section2.bullet1: Trainers and instructors who want to create their own online school capable of generating immediate revenue.
section2.bullet2: A simple, intuitive platform with professional tools for creating online courses and training.
section2.bottomText: A collaboration that allows you to grow professionally and give greater completeness to your services.

section3.title: Benefits of collaboration
section3.description: Our platform allows you to focus on training content while we take care of the technology and regulatory compliance.
section3.benefit1Desc: Immediate access to our advanced LMS platform without development costs.
section3.benefit2Desc: Total and centralized management of every aspect: courses, reports and personal area in one interface.
section3.benefit3Desc: Ability to upload your training content in SCORM format and many other formats.
section3.benefit4Desc: Issuance of certifications compliant with Italian regulations.
section3.feature4: Download reports and training certificates with one click

section4.title: Collaboration request
section4.subtitle: Fill out the form to receive more information about the partnership
section4.descrizione: Describe your business and your goals
section4.descrizionePlaceholder: Share with us how we can build a valuable partnership together...

contactUs.heroDescription: Would you like more information about our training, safety services, or a quote? Fill out the form below or use our direct contacts. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
